step_description: NOTE: Only process documents with route_to_step=5 (document_category="Site Plan"). TAL spreadsheet files and Design Brief files must be excluded. Using the processing plan from Step 2, filter the document list to only those where 'document_category' is 'Site Plan'. Do not process any document tagged as 'Design Brief'. For each Site Plan document, run the two-phase extraction defined in proc-extract-site-plan-info. Phase 1 extracts all numbered notes and callout annotations (ATTENTION/WARNING/CAUTION/NOTICE) from every page of the drawing in full. Phase 2 analyses those extracted notes to produce four structured checks: (1) Substation Data — extract the seven Substation Notes fields (Substation Asset Number, Transformer Size, HV Switchgear with 1.5MVA Siemens RLR override rule, Voltage Level, LV Switchgear, Cubicle Size, Earthing); (2) Assets Field Check Compliance — verify note 'HAVE ALL EXISTING ASSETS BEEN FIELD CHECKED AND ARE ACCURATE AT THE TIME OF DRAWING' is present and answered YES; (3) Easement Restriction — check for the swimming pool restriction-on-use-of-land easement note; (4) Easement Substation — check for the padmount substation easement note with dimensions and lot number.

sub-step-extract-all-notes.most_common_value:
1 This drawing is to be read in conjunction with the relevant Endeavour Energy
Network Standards and Connection Policy.
2 Endeavour Energy Contact Phone: 131081.
3 Design certification shall lapse where:
(i) Notice of intent has not been received within six (6) months of this certification,
or
(ii) Construction has been interrupted for more than six (6) months.
Where design certification has lapsed the design must be resubmitted for
certification by the accredited designer.
4 ATTENTION:
Accredited Service Provider to notify Endeavour Energy asset data customer
department daily when cable works is in progress (ph. 131 081).
5 ATTENTION:
Permanent survey marks may exist in this area. These are to be located by a
surveyor prior to commencement of work.
6 ATTENTION:
All services searches must be checked before construction.
7 ATTENTION:
The preparation of this design has been undertaken giving due consideration to
the location of existing services. The Constructor is however responsible for the
verification of services and permanent survey marks prior to the commencement
of construction. No responsibility nor liability will be accepted by the designer for
damage to existing services as a result of this design.
8 WARNING:
Live Endeavour Energy cables & other services in this area.
Please contact "Dial Before You Dig" on telephone: 1100 for searches two days
prior to excavation.
9 ATTENTION:
HV cable length values shown in 'Urban Subdivision Related Reimbursement -
Duct and Cable Schedule' and 'Funding Arrangements for Scope of Works' are
only reimbursement quantities calculated by Endeavour Energy. For cable
construction quantities refer to cable lengths in HV, LV and SL circuit diagrams.
10 Reimbursements:
Reimbursements will be paid to the nominated party on the letter of intent after
the works have been completed and the letter of acceptance has been issued.
The reimbursed amount is shown in the "Funding Arrangements for Scope of
Work table". Any disagreement with the amount should be resolved with
Endeavour Energy prior to the commencement of works.
11 Operational Limitations:
Unless approved otherwise, interruption to any customer's supply must be
avoided. The following alternatives should be considered:
mobile generators and substations,
live line work,
design alternatives,
low voltage parallels,
work practices/standards.
The cost is to be funded by the customer/developer.
12 Environmental Management plan:
EMP EMS0001 is part of this design (refer to SER for details).
13 Pollution Controls:
All the requirements of the Environmental Protection Authority pollution control
legislation are to be strictly adhered to.
14 Telecommunications:
Telecommunications assets are NOT affected by the proposed works.
15 Underground Cable Easement:
An 3.0m wide and variable easement for underground cables is to be created
over Lot 5 ,DP 244410 in favour of Endeavour Energy. The underground cables /
conduits are to be centrally located in the easement. (Refer to Endeavour Energy
Standard MD10044, Annexure 1 for Standard Easement Terms)
16 Land Interests:
Land Interests required to be registered prior to submission of Letter of
Intent - as per Land Interest Guidelines for Network Connection Works - July
2021 - Section 6.4
17 Substation Access:
Unrestricted 24 hour 7 day access must be provided to Endeavour Energy's staff,
vehicles and equipment to the new substation & cables Endeavour Energy locks
to be installed on locked gates. (Refer to MDI0044 , section 5.7 for details)
MATERIAL QUANTITIES SPECIFIED ON THIS DESIGN:
The quantities or dimensions specified on this design are based on
information supplied by the developer, DBYD, the Endeavour GIS, field
books and site conditions at the time of the design. As quantities and
dimensions are subject to change, the Constructor must check all
quantities and dimensions on site prior to tendering, ordering and
construction.

1 This drawing is to be read in conjunction with the relevant Endeavour Energy
Network Standards and Connection Policy.
2 Endeavour Energy Contact Phone: 131081.
3 Design certification shall lapse where:
(i) Notice of intent has not been received within six (6) months of this certification,
or
(ii) Construction has been interrupted for more than six (6) months.
Where design certification has lapsed the design must be resubmitted for
certification by the accredited designer.
4 ATTENTION:
Accredited Service Provider to notify Endeavour Energy asset data customer
department daily when cable works is in progress (ph. 131 081).
5 ATTENTION:
Permanent survey marks may exist in this area. These are to be located by a
surveyor prior to commencement of work.
6 ATTENTION:
All services searches must be checked before construction.
7 ATTENTION:
The preparation of this design has been undertaken giving due consideration to
the location of existing services. The Constructor is however responsible for the
verification of services and permanent survey marks prior to the commencement
of construction. No responsibility nor liability will be accepted by the designer for
damage to existing services as a result of this design.
8 WARNING:
Live Endeavour Energy cables & other services in this area.
Please contact "Dial Before You Dig" on telephone: 1100 for searches two days
prior to excavation.
9 ATTENTION:
HV cable length values shown in 'Urban Subdivision Related Reimbursement -
Duct and Cable Schedule' and 'Funding Arrangements for Scope of Works' are
only reimbursement quantities calculated by Endeavour Energy. For cable
construction quantities refer to cable lengths in HV, LV and SL circuit diagrams.
10 Reimbursements:
Reimbursements will be paid to the nominated party on the letter of intent after
the works have been completed and the letter of acceptance has been issued.
The reimbursed amount is shown in the "Funding Arrangements for Scope of
Work table". Any disagreement with the amount should be resolved with
Endeavour Energy prior to the commencement of works.
11 Operational Limitations:
Unless approved otherwise, interruption to any customer's supply must be
avoided. The following alternatives should be considered:
mobile generators and substations,
live line work,
design alternatives,
low voltage parallels,
work practices/standards.
The cost is to be funded by the customer/developer.
12 Environmental Management plan:
EMP EMS0001 is part of this design (refer to SER for details).
13 Pollution Controls:
All the requirements of the Environmental Protection Authority pollution control
legislation are to be strictly adhered to.
14 Telecommunications:
Telecommunications assets are NOT affected by the proposed works.
15 Underground Cable Easement:
An 3.0m wide and variable easement for underground cables is to be created
over Lot 5 ,DP 244410 in favour of Endeavour Energy. The underground cables /
conduits are to be centrally located in the easement. (Refer to Endeavour Energy
Standard MD10044, Annexure 1 for Standard Easement Terms)
16 Land Interests:
Land Interests required to be registered prior to submission of Letter of
Intent - as per Land Interest Guidelines for Network Connection Works - July
2021 - Section 6.4
17 Substation Access:
Unrestricted 24 hour 7 day access must be provided to Endeavour Energy's staff,
vehicles and equipment to the new substation & cables Endeavour Energy locks
to be installed on locked gates. (Refer to MDI0044 , section 5.7 for details)
MATERIAL QUANTITIES SPECIFIED ON THIS DESIGN:
The quantities or dimensions specified on this design are based on
information supplied by the developer, DBYD, the Endeavour GIS, field
books and site conditions at the time of the design. As quantities and
dimensions are subject to change, the Constructor must check all
quantities and dimensions on site prior to tendering, ordering and
construction.
